This classification places it among the flowering plants that are known for their diverse and often showy flowers. The genus Petalochilus itself belongs to the subfamily Cranichideae, which includes several other orchid genera. Petalochilus curtisepalus can be further grouped within the tribe Cranichideae, alongside other species with similar characteristics. This classification system helps to organize and understand the evolutionary relationships among different orchid species.
